SWRules.GeneralRules1: Speed Winner is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on the top of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring multiplier symbols up to x10.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for  %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways,  bet level of  %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 64 ways - 46,656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

SWRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

SWCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
SWCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
SWCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 3 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
SWCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
SWCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

SWMultiplierSymbol.Title: Multiplier Symbol
SWMultiplierSymbol.MultiplierExplaination1: During any main game spin, 1 or more Multiplier symbols with values ranged from x2 to x10 may appear on the reels.
SWMultiplierSymbol.MultiplierExplaination2: At the end of the spin, all multipliers from the Multiplier symbol on the reels will be added together and the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total win multiplier.

SWFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
SWFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
SWFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: During any free spin, 1 or more Multiplier symbols with values ranged from x2 to x10 may appear on the reels.
SWFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: At the end of the spin, all multipliers from the Multiplier symbol on the reels will be added together and the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total win multiplier.
